overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a winding dirt trail through rural grasslands and an eroded gully toward a distant red stone castle. The scene features overcast lighting, scattered birch trees, stone walls, and transitions from open terrain to an enclosed ravine.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt trail through grassland with birch trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt trail with swords on his back, moving through open grassland

entered.detail: winding dirt path through the grassland
cluster of white-barked birch trees on the hillside
rolling grassy hills with scattered shrubs
low stacked stone wall running alongside the path
large red stone castle or fort visible in the distant haze

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an open dirt trail through rural grassland. Birch trees line the left side while a low stone wall runs along the right. In the distance, a red stone castle is visible through the overcast haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural trail junction with stone wall ending

events.description: stone wall ends and wooden signpost appears on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the path curves slightly, passing a wooden signpost

entered.detail: weathered wooden signpost with directional markers

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through open country as the stone wall ends. A wooden signpost appears on the right, and the terrain begins to slope downward toward a gully. The red castle remains visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: eroded gully with steep earth walls

events.description: path descends into a narrow eroded gully with steep earth walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks downhill into the gully, flanked by eroded earth walls

entered.detail: steep eroded earth and clay walls with exposed roots

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow eroded gully with steep dirt walls rising on both sides. The sky becomes partially obscured by the gully edges. Geralt continues walking along the winding path toward the distant castle.

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues through the winding gully as the red castle grows larger ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues walking through the deep gully, with eroded walls flanking both sides. The red stone castle is now significantly closer and more detailed ahead, dominating the view at the end of the winding trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural trail that transitions from open grasslands into a deep, enclosed gully leading toward a distant fortress. It begins with Geralt walking past birch trees and a low stone wall under an overcast haze, with a red stone castle visible on the horizon. As the stone wall ends and the camera passes a wooden signpost, the terrain begins to slope downward, shifting the perspective from open country toward a descending path. The scene then narrows into an eroded gully where steep dirt walls rise on both sides, partially obscuring the sky as the path winds forward. Finally, the camera continues through the deep ravine, where the red stone castle grows significantly larger and more detailed, dominating the view at the end of the trail.
